heading: Definitions
label: 460rrr Definitions
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–337, § 1120 Stat. 1777Oct. 12, 2006“This Act [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘Rio Grande Natural Area Act’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–337, § 1120 Stat. 1777Oct. 12, 2006“This Act [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘Rio Grande Natural Area Act’.”

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 1 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Rio Grande Natural Area Commission established by .section 460rrr–2(a) of this title

children.heading: Natural Area
children.label: 2 Natural Area
children.text: The term “Natural Area” means the Rio Grande Natural Area established by .section 460rrr–1(a) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
